benchmark_panel.label: Crypto Trading Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Crypto strategy evaluation, execution discipline, and market-adaptive trading workflows.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing mature benchmark chip with clear strategy loops and durable market signal.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: MCP Server Development
benchmark_panel.description: MCP server scaffolding, packaging, testing, and integration workflows for developers.
benchmark_panel.rationale: High-fit benchmark for protocol-native developer tooling in the current ecosystem.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Agent Architecture
benchmark_panel.description: Agent patterns, tool selection, prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks.
benchmark_panel.rationale: AI agents are #1 category on Product Hunt 2026. MCP has 10,000+ servers.

discovered_opportunities.label: Vendor Security Review Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps teams answer recurring vendor security review requests.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Security teams repeatedly answer the same review packets for enterprise buyers.

candidate_context.mastery_surface: turning repeated vendor review work into a reusable advantage
candidate_context.user_value_loop: collect controls, draft answers, reuse winning evidence

discovered_opportunities.label: Dental Insurance Appeals AI
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps recurring insurance appeal work for dental clinics.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Dental offices repeatedly lose time and cash flow on similar appeals.

candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving recurring appeal win-rate for clinics
candidate_context.user_value_loop: gather denial data, draft appeal, learn from payer responses

discovered_opportunities.label: HVAC Maintenance Planner AI
discovered_opportunities.description: Supports recurring HVAC maintenance planning for field teams.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: The work repeats but the mastery layer still needs sharper definition.

candidate_context.user_value_loop: plan maintenance windows and follow-up tasks

shocks.label: Breakout Tool Launch
shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.label: Free Open Source Model Drop
shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.

shocks.label: Market Crash
shocks.description: Broad market downturn reduces investment appetite.
